---
title: 'Tiffâ€™s Treat â€“ Warm Cookie Delivery'
date: '2016-06-12T23:57:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4192369120198510973'
blogger_filename: '/2016/06/tiffs-treat-warm-cookie-delivery.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
  - 'Food'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<h3>
Tiffâ€™s Treat â€“ Warm @&nbsp;<a href="http://www.cookiedelivery.com/" target="_blank">CookieDelivery</a>.com is AMAZING!</h3>
<br />
<ul>
<li>114 E John Carpenter Frwy&nbsp;Irving, TX 75062</li>
<li>Phone number(972) 889-7700</li>
<li>Yelp&nbsp;<a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/tiffstreats-irving-2?hrid=XXSi3Ji86TpiBsLF4l2EYw" target="_blank">HERE</a></li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cookie-box-2f65f26236ee.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cookie-box-7b4275007d71.jpg" width="271" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div>
You know that smell of freshly baked cookies? It makes you feel all warm and fuzzy inside.<br />
<br />
Several times in the past few weeks, my co-worker has had that smell emanating from her desk. Kindly, she's offered me a cookie.<br />
<br />
It was warm, soft, breaks just right (not too hard, or too soft). It was literally the perfect cookie.<br />
<br />
Seeing as Chocolate Chip cookies are quite literally in my top ten favorite things to eat.. I was in heaven for a few moments of an otherwise stressful day.<br />
<br />
Come to to find out... this is a delivery service, not just something she brought from home.<br />
<br />
You can order freshly made, still warm cookies to be delivered to your door (if you are in delivery range).<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cookie-tray-8685161ff6eb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="185" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cookie-tray-1701565a5d95.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
Their menu (<a href="http://www.cookiedelivery.com/Menu/Cookies.aspx" target="_blank">here</a>) includes more than just cookies. They also do Ice Cream, Brownies, and other deserts.<br />
<br />
They have several delivery areas (<a href="http://www.cookiedelivery.com/Locations-Deliveries.aspx?tab=1" target="_blank">here</a>).<br />
<br />
Needless to say... the creator of this business was a genius!<br />
<br />
Great job Tiff's Treats!<br />
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
********</div>
<br />
<b>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<br />
New Here?<br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/p/start-here.html" target="_blank">Start Here</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/p/resources.html" target="_blank">Resources</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/p/who-am-i.html" target="_blank">Who am I?</a></li>
<li>More of my sites at <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/by-darrell.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a></li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
